name: ClusterBusters
description: The largest CH advocacy group. Forums, research funding (Yale psilocybin trials), annual conference, ClusterBuddies peer support, and virtual support groups.

name: Cluster Headache Support Group (CHSG)
description: One of the largest Facebook groups for CH patients and caregivers. Active daily discussions on treatments, oxygen access, and coping.

name: Cluster Headaches Worldwide Support Group
description: Online community exclusively for cluster headache sufferers. Message board and resource library.

name: The Cluster Headache Support Group (Warriors)
description: Patient-directed support, education, research, and advocacy. Worldwide patient maps to find local connections.

name: r/ClusterHeads
description: Reddit community for CH sufferers. Treatment discussions, support, and shared experiences.

name: r/ClusterHeadaches
description: Second Reddit community for cluster headache discussion and mutual support.

name: OUCH UK
description: UK's dedicated CH charity. Helpline, forum, annual conference, ER info cards, and downloadable information packs.

name: CSG e.V. (Clusterkopfschmerz-Selbsthilfe-Gruppen)
description: German federal association of CH self-help groups. 50+ regional groups serving 2,000-3,000 patients annually. Information materials in multiple European languages.

name: AFCAVF (Association Francaise Contre l'Algie Vasculaire de la Face)
description: France's dedicated CH patient association. Founded 2005, all-volunteer non-profit. Awareness campaigns and patient support.

name: MyClusters
description: Dutch CH platform maintaining a worldwide directory of patient groups. Contact info@myclusters.nl to add groups.

name: Nederlandse Hoofdpijn Vereniging (NHV)
description: Dutch Headache Association with dedicated cluster headache patient information and support section.

name: OUCH Belgium
description: Belgian CH organisation. Bilingual (FR/EN). Treatment guidance, oxygen equipment information, and patient testimonials.

name: Cluster Kopfschmerzen Verein Osterreich
description: Austrian CH patient organisation. Peer support meetings, doctor registry, and psychosocial counselling.

name: O.U.C.H. Italia / GrappoloAiuto
description: Italian CH patient organization. Forum, treatment information, and regional support directories.

name: CRAES (Cefaleas en Racimos y Primarias Espana)
description: Spanish association for cluster headache and primary headaches. Patient support and awareness.

name: ACRA (Asociacion Cefalea en Racimos Ayuda)
description: Spanish-language CH support group on Facebook. Includes patients from Spain, Argentina, Mexico, Uruguay, Colombia, Peru, and Costa Rica.

name: Migraine Ireland
description: Irish headache charity covering cluster headache alongside migraine. No dedicated Irish CH group exists; Irish patients often connect through OUCH UK.

name: MiGRA Portugal
description: Portuguese headache patient organisation covering cluster headache and migraine.

name: Hodepine Norge
description: Norwegian headache patient organisation. Includes 'Chat with doctor' service and CH-specific resources.

name: European Migraine & Headache Alliance (EMHA)
description: Umbrella organisation with 36 European patient associations for migraine, CH, and trigeminal neuralgia. Policy advocacy at EU level.

name: Migraine Canada
description: Canadian headache organisation with cluster headache resources and specialist directory.

name: ABRACES
description: Brazilian CH and migraine patient association. Led by neurologist Dr. Mario Peres. Patient support and awareness.

name: Australia New Zealand Cluster Headache Support
description: Facebook support group for CH patients in Australia and New Zealand.

name: Migraine & Headache Australia
description: National Australian organisation (Brain Foundation division) with dedicated cluster headache page and specialist resources.

name: TACSWeb
description: Patient information platform for trigeminal autonomic cephalalgias including CH, paroxysmal hemicrania, and SUNCT/SUNA.

name: The Brain Charity — Cluster Headaches
description: UK charity providing practical support, information, and social activities for people with neurological conditions including CH.

name: The Migraine Trust — Cluster Headache
description: UK charity with cluster headache information, treatment guidance, and links to specialist services.

name: Clusterbuds
description: Discord server for cluster headache patients. Real-time chat and voice support.

name: To Kill The Beast
description: International Facebook-based CH support group.

name: Beat the Beast
description: Dutch CH research fundraiser and patient organisation.

name: Cluster Headaches Australia
description: Patient-run Australian information and community site with forums for CH sufferers.

name: PatientsLikeMe — Cluster Headaches
description: Health data-sharing platform where CH patients track symptoms, treatments, and connect with others.
